content: We can combine the 2025 configurable ICM curiosity framework for swarm UAVs with the Transformer attention that naturally encodes human-like episodic memory to create a swarm of autonomous agents where each agent’s intrinsic curiosity reward is modulated by collective episodic memory of previously explored novel regions. This lets swarm UAVs avoid repeatedly re-exploring unproductive areas that the collective already marked as uninteresting, boosting exploration efficiency for distributed target search missions.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
